    window.onload = () => {
            drawTimeSeries(platformTotals.map(r => [r[0], r[1]]), 'platform_monthly', 'Wsparcie miesięczne', 'currency');
            drawTimeSeries(platformTotals.map(r => [r[0], r[2]]), 'platform_supporters', 'Patroni');

    };
</script>
